name: AROON25_Osc
description: Uses the 25-period Aroon oscillator (AroonUp minus AroonDown) on QQQ as a trend direction filter. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when the oscillator is positive—meaning a recent high was set more recently than a recent low—and parks in T-bills when trend reverses.
overfit_notes: Single textbook indicator at a standard period (25) with a zero-line threshold — minimal tuning

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: ROC20_Zero
description: Applies a 20-day rate-of-change momentum signal on QQQ with a zero-line crossover. Holds leveraged Nasdaq while trailing momentum is positive and shifts entirely to T-bills when rate of change turns negative.
overfit_notes: Single textbook momentum indicator at a common period (20) with a zero-line threshold — minimal tuning

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: KCH20x1p5
description: Uses a 20-period Keltner Channel (SMA basis, 1.5× ATR width) on QQQ as a breakout filter. Enters leveraged Nasdaq on a close above the upper band, exits to T-bills on a break below the lower band, and holds the existing position while price stays inside the channel.
overfit_notes: Single volatility-band indicator at a standard period (20); 1.5× is a common default multiplier — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ close > Keltner upper band (SMA20 + 1.5×ATR): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: QQQ close < Keltner lower band (SMA20 − 1.5×ATR): 100% BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: MFI14_Hyst
description: Applies a 14-period Money Flow Index on QQQ with hysteresis bands to reduce whipsaw. Enters leveraged Nasdaq when buying pressure dominates (MFI > 60), exits to T-bills when selling pressure takes over (MFI < 40), and holds the current position in the neutral zone.
overfit_notes: Single volume-price indicator at a standard period (14); 60/40 hysteresis bands are common textbook levels for MFI — minimal tuning

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: MFI20_50
description: Applies a 20-period Money Flow Index on QQQ with a simple midline crossover. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when volume-weighted buying pressure exceeds 50 and switches to T-bills when it falls below, with no neutral zone.
overfit_notes: Single volume-price indicator at a slightly longer period (20 vs canonical 14); midline threshold is the simplest possible — minimal tuning

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)
